missions.title: Awakening at the Docks
missions.starting_clue: Arr! I be Old Pete. The Kraken scattered our treasure maps! Start by havin' a look around the docks with 'ls'.

intro_dialogue.text: Ahoy, young pirate! I be Old Pete, navigator of Skull Island. The Kraken has scattered our treasure maps! Start by havin' a look around the docks with 'ls'.

objective_hints: Good eye! I left a note for ye somewhere in the docks. Try 'cat old_petes_note.txt' to read it!
Shiver me timbers! On to the jungle!
missions.success_message: Shiver me timbers! Ye found the first map piece!
missions.bug_taunt: BWAHAHAHA! Ye found the first dock clue! But there be nine more pieces — and they all be MINE! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: A worn note tumbles out: 'Head to the jungle — the next map piece hides there!'

/docks/welcome.txt.content: Welcome to Skull Island, brave pirate! The adventure begins here.

/docks/broken_barrel.txt.content: An empty barrel. Smells like fish.

/docks/rusty_anchor.txt.content: Too heavy to lift. Leave it.

/docks/old_petes_note.txt.content: Map Piece 1: Found it! The jungle path leads north — head there next, brave pirate!

missions.title: The Jungle Crossroads
missions.starting_clue: A true pirate always knows where they stand! Use 'pwd' to find yer position, then navigate the jungle paths.

intro_dialogue.text: A true pirate always knows where they stand! Use 'pwd' to find yer position, then navigate the jungle paths with 'cd'.

objective_hints: Arr, ye know where ye be! Now navigate south — try 'cd path_south/clearing'!
Ye made it to the clearing! Read the map piece with 'cat map_piece_2.txt'!
Excellent navigation! On to the hidden cove!
missions.success_message: Brilliant navigation! Ye found Map Piece 2!
missions.bug_taunt: HO HO! Ye navigated the jungle — but the real treasure be deeper in the island! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 2: 'Head to the hidden cove — some things there hide from plain sight!'

/jungle/path_north/dead_end.txt.content: A dead end. Nothing here but mosquitoes.

/jungle/path_north/skelly_note.txt.content: Arr! Try 'cd ..' to go back! Also has anyone seen me butt? — Skelly 💀

/jungle/strange_fruit.txt.content: Do not eat the strange fruit. Trust me.

/jungle/path_south/clearing/map_piece_2..content: Map Piece 2: Head to the hidden cove! Some things there hide from plain sight!

missions.title: The Hidden Cove
missions.starting_clue: The Kraken loves to hide things! Some secrets don't show with a regular 'ls'. Try 'ls -a' to reveal what's hidden!

intro_dialogue.text: The Kraken loves to hide things, arr! Some secrets don't show with a regular 'ls'. Try 'ls -a' to reveal what's hidden in the cove.

objective_hints: Arrr! Some things be hidden! Try 'ls -a /cove' to see what lurks in the shadows! Then 'cat' the hidden file!
Ye found the secret map! On to the captain's quarters!
missions.success_message: Gah! Ye found the hidden map! Ye have sharp eyes, young pirate!
missions.bug_taunt: GAH! Ye found me hidden file! I put it there MYSELF and ye STILL found it! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 3: The captain's quarters hold the next clue. Read everything carefully!

/cove/skelly_cat.txt.content: Mrrow... ye're looking in the right place. The hidden file be right here. Also has anyone seen me fur? — Skelly Cat 🐱

/cove/.secret_cove_map.content: Map Piece 3: The captain's quarters hold the next clue. Read everything carefully!

missions.title: The Captain's Log
missions.starting_clue: Captain Kernel left records of his voyages here. The log be long — but the next clue be at the very end. Read it all with 'cat'!

intro_dialogue.text: Captain Kernel left records of his voyages in this cabin. The log be long — but the next clue be at the very end. Read it all with 'cat captains_log.txt'!

objective_hints: Patient as a barnacle! On to the shipyard!
missions.success_message: Ye read every word! Captain Kernel would be proud!
missions.bug_taunt: ARGH! Ye have the patience of a barnacle! I thought the long scroll would stop ye! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 4: Found at the bottom of Captain Kernel's log. The shipyard awaits!

/captains_quarters/compass_note.txt.content: The compass always points toward treasure. Or north. Hard to tell.

/captains_quarters/captains_log.txt.content:
Captain's Log — Day 1: Set sail from the mainland at dawn.
Captain's Log — Day 2: Spotted flying fish. Skelly tried to catch one. He fell overboard.
Captain's Log — Day 3: Reached Skull Island. The Kraken circled the ship all night. Very rude.
Captain's Log — Day 4: Charted the docks, the jungle, and the hidden cove.
Captain's Log — Day 5: Discovered a witch's cave to the east. Did not go inside.
Captain's Log — Day 6: Found a shipyard on the south shore. Good lumber there.
Captain's Log — Day 7: The Kraken stole my best hat. Also Skelly's butt.
Captain's Log — Day 8: Explored the mountain. Nearly fell into a deep cave.
Captain's Log — Day 9: The vault at the root of the island holds the greatest treasure.
Captain's Log — Day 10: If ye be reading this, brave pirate — ye have found Map Piece 4.
  Captain Kernel says: the shipyard holds yer next challenge! Build something magnificent!

missions.title: The Shipwright's Yard
missions.starting_clue: To claim yer treasure, ye must build yer own flagpole! Use 'mkdir' to make a directory and 'touch' to create a file inside it.

intro_dialogue.text: To claim yer treasure, ye must build yer own flagpole and raise a flag! Use 'mkdir flagpole' to build it, then 'touch flagpole/flag.txt' to raise yer flag!

objective_hints: Well built! Now raise yer flag with 'touch flagpole/flag.txt'!
The flag flies high! On to the witch's cave!
missions.success_message: Ye built yer flagpole and raised a flag! A true shipwright!
missions.bug_taunt: What?! Ye built something?! The Kraken is a DESTROYER, not a builder! This is embarrassing! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 5: Nailed to the new flagpole. The witch's cave holds the next key — make a copy before The Kraken destroys it!

/shipyard/lumber.txt.content: Good wood. Could build a ship. Or a flagpole!

/shipyard/broken_mast.txt.content: Already snapped by The Kraken. Useless.

/shipyard/blueprint.txt.content: Build a flagpole/ directory, add a flag.txt inside it, and raise yer colours!

missions.title: The Duplication Ritual
missions.starting_clue: A magic key hides in the witch's cave — but The Kraken will try to destroy the original! Make a copy with 'cp' before it's too late!

intro_dialogue.text: A mysterious cave holds a magic key — but The Kraken will try to destroy the original! Make a copy with 'cp magic_key.txt safe_chest/magic_key.txt' to keep it safe!

objective_hints: The key is safe! On to the scrambled ship's hold!
missions.success_message: Brilliant! Ye copied the key to safety!
missions.bug_taunt: Ye copied the key! But can ye survive the scrambled hold?! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 6: The copied key bears a message — 'The ship's hold be scrambled. Restore order!'

/witchs_cave/magic_key.txt.content: This key opens the treasure vault. Guard it well! Copy me to safe_chest/ with 'cp magic_key.txt safe_chest/magic_key.txt'.

/witchs_cave/fake_doubloon.txt.content: A painted rock. The Kraken's trick! Not the real key.

missions.title: The Scrambled Hold
missions.starting_clue: The Kraken scrambled all the treasure pieces in the ship's hold! Move them all into the chest with 'mv' to restore order!

intro_dialogue.text: The Kraken scrambled all the treasure pieces in the ship's hold! Move them all into the chest — use 'mv piece_sword.txt chest/piece_sword.txt' and so on for each piece!

objective_hints: One piece secured! Move the next — 'mv piece_compass.txt chest/piece_compass.txt'!
Two pieces in the chest! One more — 'mv piece_map.txt chest/piece_map.txt'!
All pieces secured! The hold is restored!
missions.success_message: Order restored! All treasure pieces are safe in the chest!
missions.bug_taunt: Organized the hold?! The Kraken HATES organization! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 7: Hidden under piece_map.txt. The bilge needs cleaning next — but be careful what ye delete!

/ship/hold/piece_sword.txt.content: A fine sword piece. Move me into the chest!

/ship/hold/piece_compass.txt.content: A compass piece. Move me into the chest!

/ship/hold/piece_map.txt.content: A map piece. Move me into the chest! Map Piece 7 is yours!

/ship/hold/rats_nest.txt.content: Just rats. Lots of rats. Do not move the rats.

missions.title: The Bilge
missions.starting_clue: The bilge is full of junk! Delete the rotten files with 'rm' — but leave the treasure_key.txt alone! Read it first!

intro_dialogue.text: RAAARRR! I be the Bilge Monster! Feed me the junk files! Delete rotten_fish.txt, broken_oar.txt, and soggy_map.txt — but leave the treasure_key.txt alone! That one is important!

objective_hints: BURP! Tasty! Now delete broken_oar.txt with 'rm broken_oar.txt'!
BURP! More! Now delete soggy_map.txt with 'rm soggy_map.txt'!
BURRRRP! The bilge is clean! The Bilge Monster is satisfied!
missions.success_message: The bilge is spotless! The Bilge Monster is delighted!
missions.bug_taunt: BURP. The Bilge Monster ate well today. But the vault still awaits! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 8: Scratched into the bilge floor. The mountain peak holds the final clues — use 'find' to discover them!

/ship/bilge/rotten_fish.txt.content: Smells terrible. The Bilge Monster wants this gone. Delete it with 'rm rotten_fish.txt'.

/ship/bilge/broken_oar.txt.content: Snapped in half. Useless. Delete it with 'rm broken_oar.txt'.

/ship/bilge/soggy_map.txt.content: Completely waterlogged. Unreadable. Delete it with 'rm soggy_map.txt'.

/ship/bilge/treasure_key.txt.content: THE KEY TO THE VAULT! Do NOT delete me! I am very important! The vault is at /vault/root_treasure.txt!

missions.title: The Spyglass Plateau
missions.starting_clue: Captain Kernel's spyglass can spot anything! Use 'find' to search the mountain, then 'cat' the clue ye discover!

intro_dialogue.text: Captain Kernel's spyglass can spot anything on the island! Use 'find /mountain' to locate the hidden chest, then 'cat' the vault clue inside it!

objective_hints: Ye spotted it with the spyglass! The vault clue be at /mountain/peak/deep_cave/vault_clue.txt — read it with 'cat'!
The final path is revealed! To the vault!
missions.success_message: The final clue is found! The vault awaits!
missions.bug_taunt: NOOO! Ye found the spyglass path! There's only ONE piece left — and I'll be waiting! — The Kraken
missions.treasure: Map Piece 9: The vault is at /vault/root_treasure.txt. This is it — the final treasure!

/mountain/base/sign.txt.content: The peak is up! Keep climbing!

/mountain/forest/berry_bush.txt.content: Tasty berries. Not treasure. Skelly Cat approves though.

/mountain/loose_rocks.txt.content: These rocks say nothing useful. Very disappointing rocks.

/mountain/peak/deep_cave/vault_clue.txt.content: Final Map Piece: The vault is at /vault/root_treasure.txt — ye are SO close, brave pirate!

missions.title: The Root Vault
missions.starting_clue: This be it, young pirate! The Root Vault — heart of Skull Island. Read yer hard-earned treasure with 'cat root_treasure.txt'!

intro_dialogue.text: This be it, young pirate! The Root Vault — the heart of Skull Island. The Kraken guards it no longer. Read yer hard-earned treasure with 'cat root_treasure.txt'!

objective_hints: SKULL ISLAND CONQUERED! You are a true Pirate Master!
missions.success_message: SKULL ISLAND CONQUERED! You are a true Pirate Master!
missions.treasure:
*** TREASURE FOUND ***

CONGRATULATIONS, BRAVE PIRATE!

You have navigated every path on Skull Island,
revealed every hidden map piece,
and outsmarted The Kraken at every turn.

The Root Treasure is YOURS.

— Captain Kernel, from beyond the sea

P.S. Skelly found his butt.
     Skelly Cat found her fur.
     The Kraken is very embarrassed.
     All is well on Skull Island.

/vault/root_treasure.txt.content:
*** TREASURE FOUND ***

CONGRATULATIONS, BRAVE PIRATE!

You have navigated every path on Skull Island,
revealed every hidden map piece,
and outsmarted The Kraken at every turn.

The Root Treasure is YOURS.

— Captain Kernel, from beyond the sea

P.S. Skelly found his butt.
     Skelly Cat found her fur.
     The Kraken is very embarrassed.
     All is well on Skull Island.

/vault/krakens_diary.txt.content:
Day 1: Stole a skeleton's butt. Felt bad about it immediately.
Day 2: Scattered some maps. Classic Kraken stuff.
Day 3: A pirate is getting very close. Beginning to regret everything.
Day 4: The pirate found all my hiding spots. I am very embarrassed.
Day 5: Returned the butt. And the fur. It was the right thing to do.

/vault/skellys_note.txt.content: I FOUND IT! My butt is back! BEST DAY EVER! — Skelly 💀 (no longer buttless)
